basics.name: Junteng Liu
basics.summary: First-year PhD candidate at HKUST NLP Group, working with Professor Junxian He. Research focuses on natural language processing and machine learning.

work.name: Research Intern
work.summary: Shanghai AI Lab. Advisor: Prof. Yu Cheng.

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

publications.name: SynLogic: Synthesizing Verifiable Reasoning Data at Scale for Learning Logical Reasoning and Beyond
publications.summary: First-author publication. Co-authors: Yuanxiang Fan, Zhuo Jiang, Han Ding, Yongyi Hu, Chi Zhang, Yiqi Shi, Shitong Weng, Aili Chen, Shiqi Chen, Yunan Huang, Mozhi Zhang, Pengyu Zhao, Junjie Yan, Junxian He.

publications.name: On the Perception Bottleneck of VLMs for Chart Understanding
publications.summary: First-author publication. Co-authors: Weihao Zeng, Xiwen Zhang, Yijun Wang, Zifei Shan, Junxian He.

publications.name: On the Universal Truthfulness Hyperplane Inside LLMs
publications.summary: First-author publication. Co-authors: Shiqi Chen, Yu Cheng, Junxian He.

publications.name: In-Context Sharpness as Alerts: An Inner Representation Perspective for Hallucination Mitigation
publications.summary: Co-authors: Shiqi Chen, Miao Xiong, Junteng Liu, Zhengxuan Wu, Teng Xiao, Siyang Gao, Junxian He.

publications.name: C-Eval: A Multi-Level Multi-Discipline Chinese Evaluation Suite for Foundation Models
publications.summary: Co-authors: Yuzhen Huang, Yuzhuo Bai, Zhihao Zhu, Junlei Zhang, Jinghan Zhang, Tangjun Su, Junteng Liu, Chuancheng Lv, Yikai Zhang, Jiayi Lei, Yao Fu, Maosong Sun, Junxian He.

publications.name: Composing Parameter-Efficient Modules with Arithmetic Operations
publications.summary: Co-authors: Jinghan Zhang, Shiqi Chen, Junteng Liu, Junxian He.
